--- title: "Presentation-Assignment05" author: "Christina Dai" date: "2026-02-25" format: revealjs: theme: sky transition: fade slide-number: true execute: echo: false --- ## WDI 2022 Exploratory Data Analysis Primary school enrollment • Life expectancy • Unemployment rate --- ### Conducting Exploratory Data Analysis In this report we will be focusing on the following 3 variables in order to better understand the global landscape in 2022: 1. **primary_school_enrolment_rate:** measures the percentage of children of official primary school age who are enrolled in primary education. 2. **life_expectancy:** is the average number of years someone is expected to live 3. **unemployment_rate:** measures the percentage of the total labor force that is without work but are able to work/ looking for work. --- ### Primary School Enrollment EDA ::: {#primary_school_enrolment_rate_eda .cell execution_count=1} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Mean: 100.87404840034348 Median: 100.0222473144529 Standard Deviation: 12.037531967222588 ``` ::: ::: --- ### Life Expectancy EDA ::: {#life_expectancy_eda .cell execution_count=2} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Mean: 72.4165186136072 Median: 73.5146341463415 Standard Deviation: 7.713322276991691 ``` ::: ::: --- ### Unemployment Rate EDA ::: {#unemployment_rate_eda .cell execution_count=3} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Mean: 7.268661290322581 Median: 5.5375 Standard Deviation: 5.827726289581319 ``` ::: ::: --- ## Scatterplot (life expectancy vs unemployment rate) ::: {#cell-fig-life-unemployment .cell execution_count=4} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![Life expectancy vs. unemployment rate in 2022. Source: @worldbank_wdi_2022.](Presentation-Assignment05_files/figure-revealjs/fig-life-unemployment-output-1.png){#fig-life-unemployment width=808 height=449} ::: ::: --- ## Histogram (primary school enrollment rate) ::: {#cell-fig-enrolment-hist .cell execution_count=5} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![Primary school enrolment rate distribution (WDI 2022). Source: @worldbank_wdi_2022.](Presentation-Assignment05_files/figure-revealjs/fig-enrolment-hist-output-1.png){#fig-enrolment-hist width=821 height=449} ::: ::: --- ## Key Statistics ::: {#tbl-key-stats .cell tbl-cap='Key summary statistics for selected indicators (WDI 2022). Source: @worldbank_wdi_2022.' execution_count=6} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=49} ```{=html}
Mean Median Standard Deviation Minimum Maximum
primary_school_enrolment_rate 100.874048 100.022247 12.037532 64.395401 138.192001

``` ::: ::: --- ## Conclusion - **Negative relationship:** As shown in \@fig-life-unemployment, higher unemployment is generally associated with lower life expectancy. - **Supported by research:** Prior studies link long-term unemployment to reduced life expectancy and greater disability \[\@laditka_unemployment_disability_life_expectancy_2016; \@assari_employment_life_expectancy_2017\]. - **Enrollment pattern:** \@fig-enrolment-hist shows primary school enrollment rates are centered near 100%. - **\>100% explained:** Rates above 100% occur because gross enrollment includes over- and under-aged students. - **Indicator variation:** \@tbl-key-stats highlights differences in spread and central tendency across variables.
